narrative:
Suffield Township has 4,359 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a clear Republican lean of 7.3 percentage points.
